data.body: CLAIM PHASE COMPLETE (milestone): all 11 tickets claimed/in_progress (epic 9d50 + ac0e,e1f2,a37b,f32e,24ec,a8e5,b9c0,74d9,9f25,d4cf), every leaf with a genuine SIGNED plan-review PASS, NO --force anywhere. d4cf (hardest — new AGENT criterion) took 9 rounds; converged only via code-grounded corrections (real applies_at validator = overlay._validate_routing_entry; parent_id already in _ticket_graph_blob so one-hop show_ticket; AGENT_TIER-not-CODEBASE_GROUNDED). Refined calibration finding recorded as epic comment #2 (supersedes the 'non-convergent gate' framing): the gate is high-precision + convergent when plans are made code-accurate; expensive rounds were agent-side plan inaccuracy, not gate over-tightness. NEXT PHASE: held-out-TDD implementation of the stack. Stack order (b9c0 after 9f25): ac0e(committed)->e1f2->74d9->24ec->f32e->a8e5->d4cf->a37b->9f25->b9c0. HEAD 0fb8d17e6; all commits now safe (every leaf claimed).
